content.problemStatement:
Cyborg Jenish is angry.

He has so much rage that he decided to go on a demolition spree for QQQ days.

There are NNN cities in his world numbered 111 to NNN, in a row from left to right. That is the ithi^{th}ith city from left side is city-iii where 1≤i≤N1 \leq i \leq N1≤i≤N. The supreme leader of the world is VSM and there are infinite statues of VSM in each city.

On each day Jenish chooses two cities LLL and RRR. He starts at city-LLL and moves along the row towards right side till he reaches the city-RRR. In city-LLL he destroys 111 statue, in the next city (i.e. city-L+1L+1L+1) he destroys 222 statues, and so on till city-RRR where he destroys  R−L+1R-L+1R−L+1 statues. In other words, he destroys i−L+1i-L+1i−L+1 statues in the ithi^{th}ith city ( L≤i≤RL\leq i\leq RL≤i≤R ).

Find the total number of VSM statues he destroyed in each city after QQQ days.

Input:
The first line contains an integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case, contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ denoting the number of cities in his world and  the number of days he goes on a demolition spree respectively.
The ithi^{th}ith line of next QQQ lines of each test case contains two space-separated integers LLL and RRR denoting the starting city and the ending city respectively on ithi^{th}ith day.
###Output:


For each test case, output a single line containing NNN space-separated integers.
The ithi^{th}ith integer should denote the total number of VSM statues destroyed by cyborg Jenish in the city-iii after QQQ days.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases is less than 10610^{6}106
The sum of QQQ over all test cases is less than 10610^{6}106

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
In the first test case, the cyborg does the following:

Starts at city-1 and goes till city-3, hence destroys 111 statue in city-1, 222 in city-2, and 333 in city-3.
Starts at city-1 and goes till city-2, hence destroys 111 statue in city-1 and 222 in city-2.
Starts at city-4 and goes till city-5, hence destroys 111 statue in city-4 and 222 in city-5.
Hence he destroyed total 222 statues in city-1, 444 in city-2, 333 in city-3, 111 in city-4, and 222 in city-5.
